---
title: "🌊 Dashboard Météo Surf - Prévisions 7 jours"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: scroll
    theme: cosmo
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(DT)
library(plotly)
library(tidyr)
library(knitr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r import_data, include=FALSE}
# Importer le dataset CSV
csv_path <- if (file.exists("output/surf_data.csv")) {
  "output/surf_data.csv"
} else if (file.exists("surf_data.csv")) {
  "surf_data.csv"
} else {
  stop("❌ Fichier surf_data.csv introuvable. Exécutez : python run_surf_scrap.py")
}

data <- read.csv(csv_path, encoding = "UTF-8", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```

```{r prepare_data, include=FALSE}
# Préparer les données
data <- data %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~na_if(., "N/A"))) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~na_if(., "")))

data$wind_speed_clean <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(gsub("\\\\n", "", data$wind_speed)))

data <- data %>%
  separate(waves_size, into = c("wave_min", "wave_max"), 
           sep = " - ", remove = FALSE, fill = "right") %>%
  mutate(
    wave_min = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(wave_min)),
    wave_max = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(wave_max))
  )

data <- data %>%
  filter(!is.na(wave_min), !is.na(wave_max), 
         !is.na(wind_speed_clean), !is.na(wind_direction),
         wind_direction != "") %>%
  mutate(
    wave_mean = (wave_min + wave_max) / 2,
    time_index = row_number(),
    datetime = paste(day, hour)
  )

if (nrow(data) == 0) stop("❌ Aucune donnée valide")
```

```{r calculate_kpis, include=FALSE}
# Calculer les KPIs
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    is_good_wave = wave_mean >= 1.0,
    is_good_wind_speed = wind_speed_clean <= 50,
    is_good_wind_direction = grepl("Nord", wind_direction, ignore.case = TRUE),
    surf_score = (as.numeric(is_good_wave) * 40) + 
                 (as.numeric(is_good_wind_speed) * 30) + 
                 (as.numeric(is_good_wind_direction) * 30)
  )

# Meilleur moment
best_moment_idx <- which.max(data$surf_score)
if (length(best_moment_idx) == 0) best_moment_idx <- 1
best_moment <- data[best_moment_idx, ]

# Vague la plus haute
highest_wave_idx <- which.max(data$wave_max)
if (length(highest_wave_idx) == 0) highest_wave_idx <- 1
highest_wave <- data[highest_wave_idx, ]

# Grade
grade_score <- best_moment$surf_score
grade_text <- case_when(
  grade_score == 100 ~ "Parfait 🌟",
  grade_score >= 90 ~ "Excellent ⭐⭐⭐",
  grade_score >= 70 ~ "Très Bon ⭐⭐",
  grade_score >= 50 ~ "Bon ⭐",
  grade_score >= 30 ~ "Moyen",
  TRUE ~ "Médiocre"
)
```

Page 1 - KPIs Principaux {data-icon="fa-tachometer-alt"}
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=180}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### 🏄 Box : Meilleur moment pour surfer

```{r}
valueBox(
  value = paste(best_moment$day, best_moment$hour, sep = " - "),
  caption = paste0("🌊 ", round(best_moment$wave_mean, 2), "m | 💨 ", 
                   best_moment$wind_speed_clean, " km/h | 🧭 ", 
                   best_moment$wind_direction),
  icon = "fa-water",
  color = "success"
)
```

### 🌊 Box : Vague la plus haute de la semaine

```{r}
valueBox(
  value = paste0(round(highest_wave$wave_max, 2), " m"),
  caption = paste0("📅 ", highest_wave$day, " à ", highest_wave$hour),
  icon = "fa-chart-line",
  color = "info"
)
```

### 📊 Gauge : Qualité de la mer (meilleur moment)

```{r}
gauge(
  value = grade_score,
  min = 0,
  max = 100,
  symbol = '%',
  label = grade_text,
  gaugeSectors(
    success = c(80, 100),
    warning = c(50, 79),
    danger = c(0, 49)
  )
)
```

Row {data-height=410}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### 📈 Graphique 1 : Hauteur moyenne des vagues (sur 7 jours)

```{r}
p1 <- ggplot(data, aes(x = time_index, y = wave_mean)) +
  geom_line(color = "#2196F3", size = 1.5) +
  geom_point(color = "#2196F3", size = 2.5) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = wave_min, ymax = wave_max), 
              alpha = 0.2, fill = "#2196F3") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.0, linetype = "dashed", 
             color = "#4CAF50", size = 1.2) +
  annotate("text", x = max(data$time_index) * 0.15, y = 1.2, 
           label = "Seuil optimal : ≥ 1.0m", 
           color = "#4CAF50", fontface = "bold", size = 4.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Hauteur moyenne des vagues",
    subtitle = "Zone bleue : plage min-max | Ligne verte : seuil optimal",
    x = "Temps (prévisions chronologiques)",
    y = "Hauteur (mètres)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 18, color = "#2196F3"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray40", size = 11),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

ggplotly(p1, height = 390) %>%
  layout(hovermode = "x unified")
```

### 💨 Graphique 2 : Vitesse du vent (sur 7 jours)

```{r}
p2 <- ggplot(data, aes(x = time_index, y = wind_speed_clean)) +
  geom_line(color = "#FF9800", size = 1.5) +
  geom_point(color = "#FF9800", size = 2.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 50, linetype = "dashed", 
             color = "#F44336", size = 1.2) +
  annotate("text", x = max(data$time_index) * 0.15, y = 54, 
           label = "Limite acceptable : ≤ 50 km/h", 
           color = "#F44336", fontface = "bold", size = 4.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Vitesse du vent",
    subtitle = "Ligne rouge : limite acceptable",
    x = "Temps (prévisions chronologiques)",
    y = "Vitesse (km/h)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 18, color = "#FF9800"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray40", size = 11),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

ggplotly(p2, height = 390) %>%
  layout(hovermode = "x unified")
```

Row {data-height=410}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### 📋 Tableau : Prévisions détaillées (Jour, Heure, Taille vagues, Direction)

```{r}
table_data <- data %>%
  select(day, hour, waves_size, wind_direction) %>%
  rename(
    `📅 Jour` = day,
    `🕐 Heure` = hour,
    `🌊 Taille des vagues` = waves_size,
    `🧭 Direction du vent` = wind_direction
  )

datatable(
  table_data,
  options = list(
    pageLength = 15,
    scrollY = "340px",
    scrollX = FALSE,
    searching = TRUE,
    ordering = TRUE,
    info = TRUE,
    lengthChange = TRUE,
    lengthMenu = c(10, 15, 20, 50, 100),
    columnDefs = list(
      list(className = 'dt-center', targets = 1:3),
      list(className = 'dt-left', targets = 0)
    ),
    language = list(
      search = "Rechercher :",
      lengthMenu = "Afficher _MENU_ lignes",
      info = "Affichage de _START_ à _END_ sur _TOTAL_ prévisions"
    )
  ),
  rownames = FALSE,
  class = 'cell-border stripe hover compact',
  filter = 'top',
  caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
    style = 'caption-side: top; text-align: center; font-weight: bold; font-size: 16px; padding: 12px; color: #2196F3;',
    '🔍 Tableau interactif : Triez et filtrez les données'
  )
)
```

Page 2 - Analyse détaillée {data-icon="fa-chart-bar"}
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=300}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### 📊 Système de notation (Score sur 100 points)

```{r}
criteres <- data.frame(
  `Critère d'évaluation` = c(
    "🌊 Hauteur vague ≥ 1.0m",
    "💨 Vitesse vent ≤ 50 km/h",
    "🧭 Direction vent contient 'Nord'"
  ),
  `Points attribués` = c("40 points", "30 points", "30 points"),
  `Statut` = c(
    ifelse(best_moment$is_good_wave, "✅ Validé", "❌ Non validé"),
    ifelse(best_moment$is_good_wind_speed, "✅ Validé", "❌ Non validé"),
    ifelse(best_moment$is_good_wind_direction, "✅ Validé", "❌ Non validé")
  ),
  `Valeur mesurée` = c(
    paste0(round(best_moment$wave_mean, 2), " m"),
    paste0(best_moment$wind_speed_clean, " km/h"),
    best_moment$wind_direction
  ),
  check.names = FALSE
)

knitr::kable(
  criteres,
  align = c('l', 'c', 'c', 'l'),
  caption = paste0("<h3 style='color: #2196F3; text-align: center;'>Score total du meilleur moment : <span style='color: #4CAF50;'>", 
                   grade_score, "/100</span> - ", grade_text, "</h3>")
)
```

### ℹ️ Statistiques hebdomadaires

```{r}
nb_good <- sum(data$surf_score >= 70)
pct_good <- round(nb_good / nrow(data) * 100, 1)
nb_excellent <- sum(data$surf_score >= 90)
nb_perfect <- sum(data$surf_score == 100)

stats_html <- paste0(
  "<div style='padding: 25px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); border-radius: 15px; color: white; box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);'>",
  "<h2 style='margin-top: 0; text-align: center; font-size: 22px; border-bottom: 2px solid white; padding-bottom: 10px;'>📊 Résumé de la semaine</h2>",
  "<table style='width: 100%; color: white; font-size: 15px; margin-top: 15px;'>",
  "<tr><td style='padding: 8px;'><strong>📅 Nombre total de prévisions</strong></td><td style='text-align: right; padding: 8px;'><strong>", nrow(data), "</strong></td></tr>",
  "<tr><td style='padding: 8px;'><strong>📆 Période analysée</strong></td><td style='text-align: right; padding: 8px;'>", data$day[1], " → ", data$day[nrow(data)], "</td></tr>",
  "<tr style='background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);'><td style='padding: 8px;'><strong>🌊 Hauteur moyenne des vagues</strong></td><td style='text-align: right; padding: 8px;'><strong>", round(mean(data$wave_mean), 2), " m</strong></td></tr>",
  "<tr><td style='padding: 8px;'><strong>💨 Vitesse moyenne du vent</strong></td><td style='text-align: right; padding: 8px;'><strong>", round(mean(data$wind_speed_clean), 1), " km/h</strong></td></tr>",
  "<tr style='background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);'><td style='padding: 8px;'><strong>📏 Plage des vagues (min-max)</strong></td><td style='text-align: right; padding: 8px;'>", 
  round(min(data$wave_min), 2), " m - <strong>", round(max(data$wave_max), 2), " m</strong></td></tr>",
  "<tr><td style='padding: 8px;'><strong>✅ Conditions bonnes/excellentes (≥70%)</strong></td><td style='text-align: right; padding: 8px;'><strong>", nb_good, "</strong> prévisions (", pct_good, "%)</td></tr>",
  "<tr style='background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);'><td style='padding: 8px;'><strong>⭐ Conditions excellentes (≥90%)</strong></td><td style='text-align: right; padding: 8px;'><strong>", nb_excellent, "</strong> prévisions</td></tr>",
  "<tr><td style='padding: 8px;'><strong>🌟 Conditions parfaites (100%)</strong></td><td style='text-align: right; padding: 8px;'><strong>", nb_perfect, "</strong> prévisions</td></tr>",
  "</table>",
  "</div>"
)

htmltools::HTML(stats_html)
```

Row {data-height=400}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### 📊 Distribution des scores de qualité

```{r}
p3 <- ggplot(data, aes(x = surf_score)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 10, fill = "#9C27B0", color = "white", alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = grade_score, linetype = "dashed", color = "#4CAF50", size = 1.5) +
  annotate("text", x = grade_score + 10, 
           y = max(hist(data$surf_score, breaks = seq(0, 100, 10), plot = FALSE)$counts) * 0.85,
           label = paste0("Meilleur\nmoment\n", grade_score, "%"), 
           color = "#4CAF50", fontface = "bold", size = 4.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, 10)) +
  labs(
    title = "Répartition des scores de qualité de surf",
    subtitle = "Ligne verte : score du meilleur moment identifié",
    x = "Score de qualité (0-100 points)",
    y = "Nombre de prévisions"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 17, color = "#9C27B0"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray40", size = 11)
  )

ggplotly(p3, height = 380)
```

### 🧭 Fréquence des directions de vent

```{r}
wind_counts <- data %>%
  count(wind_direction) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  mutate(
    pct = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1),
    has_nord = grepl("Nord", wind_direction, ignore.case = TRUE)
  )

p4 <- ggplot(wind_counts, aes(x = reorder(wind_direction, n), y = n, fill = has_nord)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#4CAF50", "FALSE" = "#2196F3"),
                    labels = c("Autres", "Contient 'Nord'"),
                    name = "Type") +
  coord_flip() +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(n, " (", pct, "%)")), 
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  labs(
    title = "Répartition des directions de vent",
    subtitle = paste0("Direction la plus fréquente : ", wind_counts$wind_direction[1], 
                     " (", wind_counts$pct[1], "%)"),
    x = "Direction du vent",
    y = "Nombre de prévisions"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 17, color = "#2196F3"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray40", size = 11),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) +
  ylim(0, max(wind_counts$n) * 1.15)

ggplotly(p4, height = 380)
```
